case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK, FSB VS. ASHLEY TURNER et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR APR-02-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER, ASHLEY DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-25-2012
POS; DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE;UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFT THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER, ASHLEY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-02-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 02:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-02-2012 AT 2:00PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO THE REQUEST OF COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (610) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
